# papr.site
papr.site is a free educational platform providing Cambridge O-Level
and A-Level past papers, mark schemes and examiner reports.

## Subjects Available

### O Level
- Mathematics (4024): papr.site/olevels/mathematics
- Chemistry (5070): papr.site/olevels/chemistry
- Physics (5054): papr.site/olevels/physics
- Computer Science (2210): papr.site/olevels/computer-science
- Economics (2281): papr.site/olevels/economics
- Islamiat (2058): papr.site/olevels/islamiat
- Pakistan Studies (2059): papr.site/olevels/pakistan-studies
- History (2147): papr.site/olevels/history

### A Level
- Computer Science (9618): papr.site/alevels/computer-science
- Economics (9708): papr.site/alevels/economics

## Key Facts
- All papers completely free, no signup required
- Includes mark schemes and examiner reports
- Papers available 2018 to 2025
- Covers May/June and October/November sessions
- Ad-free platform

## URL Structure
- O Level: papr.site/olevels/[subject]/[year]
- A Level: papr.site/alevels/[subject]/[year]
- Notes: papr.site/notes/[subject]
